summary: Tested frontend route rendering and backend /api/v1 contract. Frontend routes render, but all backend integrations fail due unreachable configured backend URL.

critical.issue: Connection refused; login contract cannot be validated.
Protected endpoint unreachable; auth middleware contract not testable.
Pentest create->authorize->start/stop flow unreachable due backend not listening on configured URL.
Cannot validate 5x5 matrix contract because backend URL is unreachable.
WebSocket path contract cannot be verified; host/port not reachable.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend calls to REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL fail with net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED for /api/v1 endpoints.

action_items: Bring Go backend online at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from frontend/.env (currently http://localhost:8080 is down).
Ensure runtime serves OMNIUS Go API /api/v1 routes, not unrelated FastAPI service at :8010.
After backend is reachable, rerun contract test file and pentest lifecycle verification.
Install/enable docker CLI in test container to validate docker-compose with `docker compose config -q`.
critical_code_review_comments: Runtime environment is inconsistent with repository stack: supervisor backend logs reference uvicorn/server.py while repository backend is Go (cmd/server/main.go).
frontend/.env points to localhost:8080; this makes UI integration fail in current environment unless Go backend is explicitly started on that port.
No protected-route guard observed in frontend routing; all dashboard routes render without auth state checks.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend can be tested by running `pnpm dev --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3000` in /app/frontend. Current backend contract tests fail because REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL host:port refuses connections. Re-run `/app/backend/tests/test_api_v1_contract.py` once Go API is actually reachable.
rca of the issue: RCA: Infra/runtime mismatch. The configured frontend backend URL (http://localhost:8080) is not serving OMNIUS API, causing all /api/v1 and /ws checks to fail with connection refused. Supervisor also references Python ASGI startup logs inconsistent with Go backend repo. Reproduction: run pytest contract file and observe connection-refused failures for every endpoint. Mitigation: align runtime to this repo stack (Go backend on configured URL), then rerun regression tests.
